action.reasoning: Observation: FP-MLP (radius=2) best test AP still 0.1633 (early), recent larger models gave 0.1536-0.1575 with val plateau ~0.174 and no jsonl metrics (train.py truncated at batch loop). PyG imports continue to segfault. Analysis: Single-radius Morgan FP misses multi-scale structure; concat radius=2+3 (4096-dim) + moderate capacity model (1024-dim, 4 layers, dropout=0.1) + complete non-truncated train script (per-epoch jsonl logging of loss/val_ap/lr, grad clipping, masked BCE, ReduceLROnPlateau patience=10, 150 epochs) will improve generalization and recover/push past 0.1633 without new deps. Decision: Rewrite all 3 files with updated FP+arch+full robust training code, run then submit_eval on best.pt.
